revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社1座1社（Myojin Taisha社）・小社12座12社の計13座13社を記載。

また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社1座1社（Myojin Taisha社）・小社12座12社の計13座13社を記載。

{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社1座1社（Myojin Taisha社）・小社12座12社の計13座13社を記載。

/* 式内社 */
revision.text:
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のテンプレート化、国会図書館リンクの修正。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社1座1社（名神大社）・小社12座12社の計13座13社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[足柄上郡|足上郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''寒田神社'''||サムタノ||小||||[[寒田神社]]||[[神奈川県]][[足柄上郡]][[松田町]]|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[余綾郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''川勾神社'''||カハワノ||小||||[[川勾神社]]||神奈川県[[中郡]][[二宮町]]||相模国二宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[大住郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''前鳥神社'''||サキトリノ||小||||[[前鳥神社]]||神奈川県[[平塚市]]四之宮||相模国四宮|| |- |rowspan=2|'''高部屋神社'''||rowspan=2|タカヘヤノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[高部屋神社]]||神奈川県[[伊勢原市]]下糟屋||||rowspan=2| |- |（論）[[高森神社 (伊勢原市)|高森神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市高森|| |- |rowspan=2|'''比比多神社'''||rowspan=2|ヒヒタノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[比々多神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市三ノ宮||相模国三宮||rowspan=2| |- |（論）[[比比多神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市上粕屋|| |- |'''阿夫利神社'''||アフリノ||小||||[[大山阿夫利神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市[[大山 (神奈川県)|大山]]|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[愛甲郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''小野神社'''||ヲノノ||小||||[[小野神社 (厚木市)|小野神社]]||神奈川県[[厚木市]]小野|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[高座郡]]''' 6座（大1座・小5座） |- |rowspan=2|'''[[大庭神社]]'''||rowspan=2|オホハノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[大庭神社#大庭神社（藤沢市稲荷）|大庭神社]]||神奈川県[[藤沢市]]稲荷||||rowspan=2| |- |[[大庭神社#熊野神社（藤沢市大庭）|大庭神社舊蹟/熊野社]]||神奈川県藤沢市[[大庭 (藤沢市)|大庭]]||元宮(舊蹟) |- |'''深見神社'''||フカミノ||小||||[[深見神社]]||神奈川県[[大和市]]深見|||| |- |'''宇都母知神社'''||ウツモチノ||小||||[[宇都母知神社]]||神奈川県藤沢市打戻|||| |- |'''寒川神社'''||サムカハノ||名神大||||[[寒川神社]]||神奈川県[[高座郡]][[寒川町]]||相模国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/150101.html] |- |'''有鹿神社'''||アリカノ||小||||[[有鹿神社]]||神奈川県[[海老名市]]上郷|||| |- |rowspan=7|'''[[石楯尾神社]]'''||rowspan=7|イハタテヲノ||rowspan=7|小||rowspan=7| ||[[石楯尾神社#石楯尾神社 (相模原市緑区名倉)|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県相模原市[[緑区 (相模原市)|緑区]]名倉||||rowspan=7| |- |（論）[[石楯尾神社#石楯尾神社 (相模原市緑区佐野川)|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県相模原市緑区佐野川|| |- |（論）[[石楯尾神社#石楯尾神社 (相模原市南区)|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県相模原市南区磯部|| |- |（論）[[諏訪明神 (相模原市)|諏訪明神]]||神奈川県相模原市緑区大島|| |- |（論）[[諏訪神社 (大和市)|諏訪神社]]||神奈川県大和市[[下鶴間]]|| |- |（論）[[石楯尾神社#諏訪明神 (座間市入谷)|諏訪明神]]||神奈川県[[座間市]]入谷|| |- |（論）[[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)#社殿・境内|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県藤沢市[[鵠沼]]||[[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|皇大神宮]]境内[[末社]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション
== 関連項目 == * [[六所神社 (大磯町)|六所神社]] - 相模国総社。 * [[平塚八幡宮]] - 相模国五宮。

revision.text:
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のテンプレート化、国会図書館リンクの修正。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社1座1社（名神大社）・小社12座12社の計13座13社を記載。

'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のテンプレート化、国会図書館リンクの修正。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社1座1社（名神大社）・小社12座12社の計13座13社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[足柄上郡|足上郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''寒田神社'''||サムタノ||小||||[[寒田神社]]||[[神奈川県]][[足柄上郡]][[松田町]]|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[余綾郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''川勾神社'''||カハワノ||小||||[[川勾神社]]||神奈川県[[中郡]][[二宮町]]||相模国二宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[大住郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''前鳥神社'''||サキトリノ||小||||[[前鳥神社]]||神奈川県[[平塚市]]四之宮||相模国四宮|| |- |rowspan=2|'''高部屋神社'''||rowspan=2|タカヘヤノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[高部屋神社]]||神奈川県[[伊勢原市]]下糟屋||||rowspan=2| |- |（論）[[高森神社 (伊勢原市)|高森神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市高森|| |- |rowspan=2|'''比比多神社'''||rowspan=2|ヒヒタノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[比々多神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市三ノ宮||相模国三宮||rowspan=2| |- |（論）[[比比多神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市上粕屋|| |- |'''阿夫利神社'''||アフリノ||小||||[[大山阿夫利神社]]||神奈川県伊勢原市[[大山 (神奈川県)|大山]]|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[愛甲郡]]''' 1座（小） |- |'''小野神社'''||ヲノノ||小||||[[小野神社 (厚木市)|小野神社]]||神奈川県[[厚木市]]小野|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[高座郡]]''' 6座（大1座・小5座） |- |rowspan=2|'''[[大庭神社]]'''||rowspan=2|オホハノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2| ||[[大庭神社#大庭神社（藤沢市稲荷）|大庭神社]]||神奈川県[[藤沢市]]稲荷||||rowspan=2| |- |[[大庭神社#熊野神社（藤沢市大庭）|大庭神社舊蹟/熊野社]]||神奈川県藤沢市[[大庭 (藤沢市)|大庭]]||元宮(舊蹟) |- |'''深見神社'''||フカミノ||小||||[[深見神社]]||神奈川県[[大和市]]深見|||| |- |'''宇都母知神社'''||ウツモチノ||小||||[[宇都母知神社]]||神奈川県藤沢市打戻|||| |- |'''寒川神社'''||サムカハノ||名神大||||[[寒川神社]]||神奈川県[[高座郡]][[寒川町]]||相模国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/150101.html] |- |'''有鹿神社'''||アリカノ||小||||[[有鹿神社]]||神奈川県[[海老名市]]上郷|||| |- |rowspan=7|'''[[石楯尾神社]]'''||rowspan=7|イハタテヲノ||rowspan=7|小||rowspan=7| ||[[石楯尾神社#石楯尾神社 (相模原市緑区名倉)|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県相模原市[[緑区 (相模原市)|緑区]]名倉||||rowspan=7| |- |（論）[[石楯尾神社#石楯尾神社 (相模原市緑区佐野川)|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県相模原市緑区佐野川|| |- |（論）[[石楯尾神社#石楯尾神社 (相模原市南区)|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県相模原市南区磯部|| |- |（論）[[諏訪明神 (相模原市)|諏訪明神]]||神奈川県相模原市緑区大島|| |- |（論）[[諏訪神社 (大和市)|諏訪神社]]||神奈川県大和市[[下鶴間]]|| |- |（論）[[石楯尾神社#諏訪明神 (座間市入谷西)|諏訪明神]]||神奈川県[[座間市]]入谷西|| |- |（論）[[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)#社殿・境内|石楯尾神社]]||神奈川県藤沢市[[鵠沼]]||[[皇大神宮 (藤沢市)|皇大神宮]]境内[[末社]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション
== 関連項目 == * [[六所神社 (大磯町)|六所神社]] - 相模国総社。 * [[平塚八幡宮]] - 相模国五宮。
== 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate15.html 相模国 式内社13座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''', i.e. the shrines of {{ill|Sagami Province|de|Provinz Sagami|ja|相模国|zh|相模國}} recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳}}. This page also includes the {{ill|Shikigeisha|de|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|zh|式外社}} of {{ill|Sagami Province|de|Provinz Sagami|ja|相模国|zh|相模國}}—shrines known from other records (e.g., the {{ill|Rikkokushi|de|Rikkokushi|ja|六国史|zh|六國史}}) but excluded from the Engishiki Jinmyōchō—presented in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳}}, a total of 13 seats are listed: one Myōjin Taisha and twelve Shōsha shrines.
{{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- | colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;" | '''Ashigarakami District''' 1 seat (Shōsha) |- | '''寒田神社''' || samutano || Shikinai Shōsha || || {{ill|Samutano Shrine|de|Samutano-Schrein|ja|寒田神社|zh|寒田神社}} || {{ill|Matsuda, Ashigarakami District, Kanagawa|de|Matsuda, Bezirk Ashigarakami, Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県足柄上郡松田町|zh|神奈川县足柄上郡松田町}} || |- | colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;" | '''Yussai District''' 1 seat (Shōsha) |- | '''川勾神社''' || kahawano || Shikinai Shōsha || || {{ill|Kawakono Shrine|de|Kawakono-Schrein|ja|川勾神社|zh|川勾神社}} || {{ill|Ninomiya, Naka District, Kanagawa|de|Ninomiya, Bezirk Naka, Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県中郡二宮町|zh|神奈川县中郡二宫町}} || Known as the second shrine of Sagami Province. |- | colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;" | '''Ōsumi District''' 4 seats (Shōsha) |- | '''前鳥神社''' || sakitorino || Shikinai Shōsha || || {{ill|Sakitorino Shrine|de|Sakitorino-Schrein|ja|前鳥神社|zh|前鸟神社}} || {{ill|Hiratsuka, Kanagawa|de|Hiratsuka, Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県平塚市四之宮|zh|神奈川县平塚市四之宫}} || Fourth shrine of Sagami Province. |- | rowspan=2 | '''高部屋神社''' || rowspan=2 | takaheyano || rowspan=2 | Shikinai Shōsha || rowspan=2 | || {{ill|Takamiya Shrine|de|Takamiya-Schrein|ja|高部屋神社|zh|高部屋神社}} || {{ill|Shimosone, Isehara, Kanagawa|de|Shimosone, Isehara, Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県伊勢原市下糟屋|zh|神奈川县伊势原市下糟屋}} || rowspan=2 | |- | ({{ill|candidate shrines|de|Kandidatenheiligtümer|ja|論社|zh|论社|lt=candidate}}) {{ill|Takamori Shrine|de|Takamori-Schrein|ja|高森神社|zh|高森神社}} || {{ill|Takamori, Isehara, Kanagawa|de|Takamori, Isehara, Kanagawa|ja|神奈川県伊勢原市高森|zh|神奈川县伊势原市高森}} | |- <!-- ... remaining table rows translated similarly ... --> |}
== Shikigeisha (式外社) == Shrines known at the time of compilation of the Engishiki Jinmyōchō but not listed in that text.
== References == === Notelist === <references group="Note"/> === Reflist === {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂 [{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} ''Engishiki'' Volume I (Ōokayama Shoten, 1929) – National Diet Library Digital Collections * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} ''Engishiki'' Volume II (Nihon Koten Zenshū Kankōkai, 1929) – National Diet Library Digital Collections
=== See Also === * {{ill|Rokushō Shrine (Ōiso)|de|Rokushō-Schrein|ja|六所神社 (大磯町)|zh|六所神社}} – Sōja shrine of Sagami Province. * {{ill|Hiratsuka Hachiman-gū|de|Hiratsuka Hachiman-gū|ja|平塚八幡宮|zh|平塚八幡宮}} – Fifth-ranked shrine of Sagami Province.
== External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate15.html Sagami Province: 13 Shikinai Shrines] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program "Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection"

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==
『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== References == === Note List === <references group="Note"/> === Reference List === {{reflist}} * Kōten Kōkyūsho & Zenkoku Shinkokai, eds. [{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} ''Engishiki, Volume I''] (Ōokayama Shoten, 1929) – National Diet Library Digital Collection * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} ''Engishiki, Volume II''] (Japanese Classics Complete Publication Association, 1929) – National Diet Library Digital Collection
=== See Also === * {{ill|Rokusho Shrine|ja|六所神社 (大磯町)|1=Rokusho Shrine (Ōiso)|2=ja|3=六所神社 (大磯町)|lt=Rokusho Shrine}} – provincial collective shrine of Sagami Province. * {{ill|Hiratsuka Hachiman-gū|ja|平塚八幡宮}} – fifth shrine of Sagami Province.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. '''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Shikinaisha shrines" to "Shikinaisha"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==
『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== References == === Note List === <references group="Note"/> === Reference List === {{reflist}} * Kōten Kōkyūsho & Zenkoku Shinkokai, eds. [{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} ''Engishiki, Volume I''] (Ōokayama Shoten, 1929) – National Diet Library Digital Collection * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} ''Engishiki, Volume II''] (Japanese Classics Complete Publication Association, 1929) – National Diet Library Digital Collection
=== See Also === * {{ill|Rokusho Shrine|ja|六所神社 (大磯町)|1=Rokusho Shrine (Ōiso)|2=ja|3=六所神社 (大磯町)|lt=Rokusho Shrine}} – provincial collective shrine of Sagami Province. * {{ill|Hiratsuka Hachiman-gū|ja|平塚八幡宮}} – fifth shrine of Sagami Province.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. '''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Shikinai Shrines" to "Shikinaisha"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Translated shikinaisha lists]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.
{{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Engishiki Jinmyocho" to "Engishiki Jinmyōchō"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==
『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。

'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 -->

revision.comment: Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==
『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "/Shikinaisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳}}" to "|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "candidate shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳" to "candidate shrines|1=Engishiki_Jinmyōchō#Ronsha|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki_Jinmyocho|lt=Ronsha}}"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582137]] Wikidata name: Shrines in Sagami Province [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==
『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582137]] Wikidata name: Shrines in Sagami Province [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582137]] Wikidata name: Shrines in Sagami Province [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582137]] Wikidata name: Shrines in Sagami Province [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha Shrines (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, one Myōjin Grand Shrine (Myojin Taisha-sha) and twelve minor shrines (Shōsha) are recorded, thirteen shrines in total.

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Finished the linking in this list, but not all the redlinks converted to interlanguage links[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 19 March 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''相模国の式内社一覧'''（さがみのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[相模国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のtenプreーto化、国会図書館rinkuの修正。 --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Shrines in Sagami Province}}

The ''Engishiki'' counts **{'amount': '+13', 'unit': '1'} shikinaisha** in the province – **{'amount': '+12', 'unit': '1'} shosha** and **{'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'} taisha**.

revision.text:
{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582137]]} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}
On this page we will also cover the {ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts **13 shikinaisha** in the province – **12 shosha** and **1 taisha**.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:46, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:30, 30 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582137]]
[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:28, 2 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:18, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:27, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 15:15, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:27, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:03, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
