The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:13, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Sagami Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:54, 6 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 12 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 1 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:36, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Sagami Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:22, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shōsha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shōsha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shōsha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:17, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.

[[:ja:相模国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:17, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Sagami Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 12 Shikinai Shosha and 1 Shikinai Taisha.
